problem: Why does the immune system attack the body's own tissue in autoimmune disease?
mechanism: Photodynamic therapy targeting specific cell receptors
hypothesis: Photodynamic therapy targeting specific cell receptors may resolve Why does the immune system attack the body's own tissue in autoimmune disease? by activating at the molecular level.

experiment.protocol: In vitro cell culture assay with 19 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: What we observe is not nature itself but nature exposed to our method of questioning. — Heisenberg
